zh.title: Solana/美元技术分析：震荡偏弱下行趋势
zh.content:
当前SOL短线呈震荡偏弱结构，价格运行于67美元下方，连续回落后维持低位整理，整体动能偏空。

MACD处于零轴下方并持续放量，动能柱偏空，价格低于SMA20均线，短期均线压制明显，反弹力度有限。

下方关键支撑位关注65.8及65.5区域，若跌破或打开下行空间；上方阻力集中在67.1及67.3一带。

交易建议以反弹做空为主，未站稳67.3前偏空思路，激进可在66附近轻仓试空，止损设67.6上方。

en.title: Solana vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Solana against the US dollar is currently exhibiting a mild bearish bias after failing to sustain momentum above recent intraday highs. Price action around 66.04 shows compression within a tight range near 65.82–67.26, indicating indecision but leaning toward downside continuation. The market has been unable to reclaim the 20-period moving average, suggesting that short-term trend strength remains weak and sellers still dominate minor rebounds. Overall structure favors cautious downside.

Momentum indicators reinforce bearish pressure. The MACD reading at -0.30966117 confirms negative momentum, with the histogram likely remaining below the zero line, reflecting sustained selling interest. Although RSI data is unavailable, price behavior below the 20-day SMA at 67.10350 suggests weakened relative strength. Failure to reclaim this moving average indicates that short-term rallies are being sold into rather than signaling trend reversal.

Immediate support is observed near the session low at 65.82, with a deeper cushion around the psychological 65.00 level if selling accelerates. On the upside, resistance is firmly positioned at 67.26, closely aligned with the 20-day SMA at 67.10, creating a confluence zone. A decisive break above this area would be required to shift momentum toward 68.50–70.00 region. Price reacts strongly at these levels.

Traders may consider maintaining a defensive stance while price remains below the 20-day SMA, favoring short-term range trading between support and resistance boundaries. Long positions should ideally wait for a confirmed breakout above 67.26 with volume support, while failure to hold 65.82 could trigger continuation toward lower liquidity zones. Risk management remains essential given the current bearish momentum and lack of strong reversal signals.
